_comment: TEMPLATE / SOURCE-OF-TRUTH for the Apify Schedules this product expects. NOTHING here is auto-deployed; <PLACEHOLDERS> must be filled with YOUR real actor/task ids and a NON-IDENTIFYING subject_token (e.g. a 5-char SHA-1 hash prefix, HIBP-style — never an email/handle/name). Apply via the Apify API (POST /v2/schedules) using register-schedules.js, or mirror in Console. Each schedule may reference at most 10 actors + 10 tasks (Apify limit). cron is GENERATED by cadence-policy.js, not hand-typed here; the literal cron strings below are the deterministic output for the stated cadence and are shown for review only.

scheduling_rules.anti_compulsion: Effective interval = SLOWER of (requested cadence, distress floor). Higher distress_risk_score => slower, never faster.
scheduling_rules.k_anonymous_naming: Schedule names carry only a short subject_token (HIBP-style), never identity.

schedules.name: mirrortrace-reaudit-self-<SUBJECT_TOKEN>
schedules.description: Closure-Mode weekly self re-audit. One paced sweep replaces compulsive manual checking. cron generated by cadence-policy for cadence=closure.

schedules.name: mirrortrace-reaudit-public_figure-<SUBJECT_TOKEN>
schedules.description: Public-figure monitoring, daily ceiling. Allowed only because scope=public_figure; still routed through the run-time scope gate.
